subcodes.title: Address to the Baha'is at 780 West End (Kinney home) in New York, 1912-12-02
subcodes.first_line: You are all welcome. This is a goodly assemblage. Praise be to God! The hearts are directed
subcodes.first_line_orig: خوش آمدید خوب مجمعی است الحمد للّه وجوه منجذب بملکوت ابهی رویها متوجّه بآسمان است
subcodes.subjects: @lists; enumerations of Baha'i principles, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @unity; oneness of humanity, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @House of Justice, @religion as source of love and unity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @oneness; unity of religion, @harmony of science and religion, @equality of men and women
